skills.name: thor-skills
skills.description: Entry point and router for THOR-related work: running scans, analyzing THOR logs, troubleshooting THOR behavior, maintaining THOR installs, THOR Lens workflows, writing THOR plugins (v11+), and creating custom signatures/IOCs.

skills.name: thor-db
